summary: Smoke fixture for Phase 49 LRN-02 — surfaces one failure pattern at project scope plus one ordinary refinement.

proposals.proposed_content: Always restart porter-fastify after frontend rebuild. Backend serves statics; rebuild without restart = blank screen.

phrasing_examples: rebuild without restart breaks the bundle
source_evidence.reasoning: Two smoke sessions reinforced the served-stale-bundle pattern.

failure_patterns.pattern_name: YMC logo freehanded instead of vector asset
failure_patterns.description: Across three sessions Moe complained that the model freehanded the logo SVG path instead of using the vector asset at /assets/logo.svg. Same right-bracket position, same wrong size, same missing capital Y.
failure_patterns.suggested_directive: YMC logo: use the vector asset at /assets/logo.svg. Never freehand SVG paths for the logo. Right bracket position and YMC capitalization are fixed by the asset.
